hooks.description: Validate founder wrote a handoff for current iteration before going idle
Validate task has deliverables for current iteration before marking complete

hooks.prompt: Check if the file just written/edited is inside a .startup/ directory and matches: handoffs/*.md, reviews/*.md, signoffs/*.md, or go-live/*.md. If NOT, output nothing. If YES: 1) Read the written file. 2) Extract up to 3 reusable project learnings (tech stack decisions, coding conventions, error patterns, API gotchas, business/legal rules). Skip obvious knowledge. 3) Read CLAUDE.md at git root. If missing, create with '# Project Learnings' header and '## Learnings' section. If exists but lacks '## Learnings', append it. 4) Skip entries semantically equivalent to existing ones. 5) Append new entries under '## Learnings' — one dash per line, laconic (~15 words max), NEVER/ALWAYS for rules. Max 3 new entries. If nothing worth recording, output nothing.

hooks.description: Prevent premature session exit without solution signoff (enforced after iteration 2+)
